mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER m
m.ROLE != 'ADMIN'
AND ( m.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND m.ROLE = #{role}
AND m.STATUS = #{status}
AND m.CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND m.CREATED_AT <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 - 1/86400
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'BLACKLISTED', SUSPENSION_END_DATE = TO_DATE('9999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', SUSPENSION_END_DATE = NULL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_TYPE as reportType, REASON as reason, ADMIN_MEMO as adminMemo, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_MEMBER_ID = #{id} AND RESULT_STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN ROLE != 'ADMIN' THEN 1 END) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 END) as newToday, COUNT(CASE WHEN ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND STATUS = 'SUSPENDED' THEN 1 END) as suspended, COUNT(CASE WHEN ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND STATUS = 'BLACKLISTED' THEN 1 END) as blacklisted FROM MEMBER

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, m.NICKNAME, m.EMAIL, m.ROLE, m.STATUS, m.SOCIAL_PROVIDER AS provider, m.CURRENT_LV, TO_CHAR(m.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS joined_at, TO_CHAR(m.LAST_LOGIN, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS last_login, TO_CHAR(m.SUSPENSION_END_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS suspension_end_date, /* 모달 팝업 내부 프로필 카드의 건수도 승인된 카운트만 일치하도록 수정 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID AND RESULT_STATUS = 'ACCEPTED') AS reports FROM MEMBER m WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{id}

SELECT HISTORY_ID as historyId, REPORT_ID as reportId, REPORTER_MEMBER_ID as reporterId, REPORT_TYPE as reportType, REASON as reason, RESULT_STATUS as resultStatus, ADMIN_MEMO as adminMemo, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_MEMBER_ID = #{id} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

WITH AcceptedLatest AS ( SELECT TARGET_MEMBER_ID, REASON, CREATED_AT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TARGET_MEMBER_ID ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC) as rn FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE RESULT_STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' ), AcceptedStats AS ( SELECT TARGET_MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) AS ACCEPTED_COUNT, MAX(CREATED_AT) AS LATEST_ACCEPTED_DATE FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE RESULT_STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' GROUP BY TARGET_MEMBER_ID ) SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, m.NICKNAME, m.EMAIL, m.ROLE, m.STATUS, m.SOCIAL_PROVIDER AS provider, m.CURRENT_LV, TO_CHAR(m.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS joined_at, TO_CHAR(m.LAST_LOGIN, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS last_login, s.ACCEPTED_COUNT AS reports, r.REASON AS report_reason, TO_CHAR(s.LATEST_ACCEPTED_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS last_report_date, '승인 완료' AS result_status, TO_CHAR(m.SUSPENSION_END_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS suspension_end_date FROM MEMBER m JOIN AcceptedStats s ON m.MEMBER_ID = s.TARGET_MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN AcceptedLatest r ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.TARGET_MEMBER_ID AND r.rn = 1 WHERE m.ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND s.ACCEPTED_COUNT >= 3 ORDER BY s.ACCEPTED_COUNT DESC, s.LATEST_ACCEPTED_DATE DESC
